target_notes: TAASINGE — US-flagged fishing vessel, MMSI 303324000 (MID 303 = Alaska/USA in ITU MID assignments). Captured tracks for one day 2024-01-01 UTC from NOAA Marine Cadastre's public AIS data feed. The Global Fishing Watch (GFW) gateway API requires authentication that's outside v0 scope; Marine Cadastre serves the same family of AIS data that GFW + every fishing-effort study processes. Predicates anchored to the underlying ITU-R M.1371 AIS standard apply unchanged regardless of host. case_002 may wire the GFW gateway when an auth path is added.
capture_method: Downloaded the 277 MB compressed daily AIS ZIP from NOAA Marine Cadastre to /tmp scratch (uncompressed CSV is 770 MB). Used Polars scan_csv with infer_schema_length=10000 + filter to VesselType=30 (Fishing per ITU-R M.1371 maritime ID enum). Among 1,095 fishing vessels in the day, picked MMSI 303324000 from the 100-500-track-count bucket sorted ascending (a moderate-activity vessel that exercises the schema without being too noisy). Filtered all rows for that MMSI and persisted as a 14.7 KB zstd-compressed Parquet. Deleted /tmp scratch.
